block_00: ...markets reopen following the long Easter weekend
block_01: It’s Monday, & business as usual for a number of markets around the world.
block_02: The United States, Canada, Brazil, Singapore & India are among those who are operating today. However in the UK & the rest of Europe, plus Hong Kong, Australia & New Zealand, the markets will remain closed in celebration of Easter Monday.
block_03: IQ Option will continue to offer trading on all assets, except for Stocks & Indices from European markets. Options will have a late opening.
block_04: If you are a keen trader of European Stocks, feel free to contact your account manager to find out a little more about other assets we have to offer on the platform.
